team.title: Who
team.subtitle: An Argentine team combining cutting-edge technology with business vision.
team.ctaBtn: Meet the team on a call
team.m1Desc: He doesn't wait for tools to exist — he builds them. As Chief AI Officer of MostachIA, he designs the agent systems that automate processes, generate reports, and power businesses across industries as diverse as cinema, hospitality, and retail.
team.m2Desc: He is the bridge between what MostachIA can do and what each client truly needs. He listens first, proposes second. He has the ability to translate business challenges into concrete solutions, and to build trust from the very first conversation.
team.m3Desc: She makes MostachIA look, feel, and communicate. Behind every piece of communication is a strategic decision of hers. She combines creative judgment with results-focused thinking, ensuring the brand says exactly what it needs to say.
team.m4Desc: He makes everything work when no one is watching. He designs and maintains the infrastructure that runs the agents, workflows, and integrations for each client. Meticulous, resourceful, and always one step ahead of problems before they appear.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: What everyone asks us before getting started.
faq.q1: What types of businesses do you work with?
faq.a1: Any business that has data and wants to leverage it. We've implemented systems for cinemas, restaurants, ice cream shops, health stores, accounting firms, pharmacies, and e-commerce. The architecture is modular and adapts to any industry.
faq.q2: Do I need to have a database?
faq.a2: Not necessarily. If you already have a system (POS, CRM, Excel, Google Sheets), we'll connect to it. If you have nothing, we'll help you build the structure from scratch.
faq.a3: It depends on complexity. A basic WhatsApp agent can be up in 1 week. A complete system with dashboards, analytics, and automation takes 2-4 weeks.
faq.a4: Yes. All our agents can work on WhatsApp. Send a message, the agent queries your real data and responds with information, dashboards, or automatic actions.
faq.a5: It depends on what you need. We work with custom projects and monthly plans. The best approach is to schedule a free 30-minute call to understand your case and give you a precise proposal with a fixed price.
faq.a6: Yes. All dashboards have a PDF download button and can also be printed directly from the browser. Data is always real-time.
faq.q7: Do you integrate with my current systems?
faq.a7: Yes. We integrate with MySQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Google Sheets, Gmail, WhatsApp, MercadoPago, AFIP, Shopify, TiendaNube, and virtually any system with an API.
faq.q8: What if I need something not listed in your services?
faq.a8: We do custom development. Tell us what you need in a meeting and we'll let you know if we can help and how long it will take.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s2Content: Through the contact form we collect: name, email, WhatsApp number (optional), and message. This data is used exclusively to respond to your inquiry and contact you.
privacy.s3Content: Personal data is used to: respond to inquiries, send information about our services (if requested), and improve our support.
privacy.s4Content: Data is stored securely and not shared with third parties except as required by law. We implement technical measures to protect your information.
privacy.s5Content: This site may use technical and analytics cookies (Google Analytics) to improve the browsing experience. No advertising cookies are used.
privacy.s6Content: You may request access, rectification, or deletion of your personal data at any time by writing to us at
privacy.s7Content: For any inquiries related to this policy, write to us at
